description: Used in old Legacy content like old inspectors and panels.

fields.Thickness: How 3D the plane should be, making it more like a box.
fields.TopLeftCut: How much to bevel the top left corner.
fields.BottomRightCut: How much to bevel the bottom right corner.
fields.Relief: indent the center inwards or not.

usage: Attach to a slot, and use the ``Settup Renderer`` button to view the mesh.
